      • getIp

        public String getIp()
        从类复制的说明: URL
        Fetch IP address for this URL.

        Pls. note that IP should be used instead of Host when to compare with socket's address or to search in a map which use address as its key.

        覆盖:
        getIp 在类中 URL
        返回:
        ip in string format
